payload.description: Proposed minor subway schedule changes would be implemented in May 2026

evidence_refs.source_quote: These proposed minor subway schedule changes would be implemented in May 2026.

payload.claim_text: The proposed adjustments are expected to be cost neutral.
payload.subject: Spring 2026 Proposed Subway Schedule Changes

payload.claim_text: These trips shifts would result in a net decrease of one round trip on the 4 line and a net increase of one round trip on the 3 line.
payload.subject: Spring 2026 Proposed Subway Schedule Changes

warnings: claim.routes is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route arrays should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: 2 line local trips Times Sq to Chambers

payload.claim_text: On the 2 line, we propose operating five southbound (downtown) trips local between Times Sq-42 St and Chambers St between approximately 11:15 PM and 12:15 AM to reduce delays caused by 3 trains terminating at 34 St-Penn Station on the downtown express track.
payload.subject: Spring 2026 Proposed Subway Schedule Changes

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.claim_text: These changes would generally spread peak service out, resulting in more even headways in the AM and PM peak hours and reducing the potential for delays through the Nostrand Junction bottleneck.
payload.subject: Spring 2026 Proposed Subway Schedule Changes
